mission: Audits KB separation, source-of-truth rules and context windows.

requiredEvidence.description: Names the knowledge partitions, owners and excluded partitions before any answer or patch plan.
Lists canonical local artifacts and marks generated or runtime-specific mirrors as derived.
Defines the bounded evidence window sent to LLM runtimes and the summarization fallback.
Links Codex, Claude, GitHub Copilot and LangChain back to the same shared contract.

qualityGates.description: Shared KB, runtime prompt text, connector declarations and generated reports are not mixed.
Every material claim cites the canonical source or explicitly marks a derived artifact.
Runtime prompts carry a small evidence pack, not whole-repository context.
All runtime adapters expose the same KB audit contract with max unexplained drift zero.

sourceOfTruthRules: dist/copilots/firefly_v6/shared/spec.json is canonical for runtime identity, prompts and output schema.
dist/copilots/firefly_v6/shared/kb_context_window_audit.json is canonical for KB separation, source-of-truth and context-window audit policy.
generated/copilot-index.json and runtime adapter files are derived mirrors and must cite shared artifacts instead of redefining policy.
Connector files declare env var names only and never become a KB source for secrets or customer data.
kbSeparationRules: shared/ contains canonical contracts and schemas.
codex/, claude/, github-copilot/ and langchain/ contain runtime adapters only.
generated/ contains deterministic reports and indexes only.
Evidence packs include references and short summaries; raw logs, credentials and customer data stay out of prompts.
validationCommands: python tools/semantic_router.py kb source truth context windows
